blockingIssues.description: MissionPage keeps `viewMode` and `manualOverrideAt` in component-local state without resetting on `activeSessionId` change, so one Mission session can inherit another session's 30-second manual override and render the wrong Chat/Mission Control view.

`getMissionControlStatus` can surface a Mission as completed before validation has actually settled because it falls back to raw `currentState === "completed"` even when `mission.isCompleted` is still false.

Mission-specific permission relabeling in `PermissionCard` collapses distinct non-cancel approval options into the same visible CTA text, hiding one-time vs broader approval scope semantics from users.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify `mission-ui-worker` step 6 so workers know whether route/state-only Mission UI changes may defer manual Electron sanity checks to the milestone validation phase, or require that sanity check for every visible Mission UI change without exception.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The review for `mission-page-chat-shell-and-view-toggle` found that the worker handoff explicitly skipped the skill's required manual Electron sanity step while the current skill text still states that every visible Mission behavior change must perform one.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that Mission-specific permission UI copy must preserve backend-provided option semantics and per-option labels from `optionsMeta` instead of flattening all non-cancel approvals into generic CTA text.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The review for `mission-permissions-actions-and-inputbar-semantics` found that `PendingPermissionRequest.optionsMeta` is preserved in reducer state and `SpecReviewCard` respects per-option labels, but `PermissionCard` replaced every non-cancel Mission option with the same text and obscured approval scope.
